rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GUARANTEE BINDING AND EFFECTIVE. DEFENDANT FAILS TO RAISE ANY CLAIM AS TO LACK OF NOTICE IN ANSWER AND FAILS TO PROVIDE DECLARATION RE LACK OF NOTICE. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al VS. JAMES H CHAU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER
rulings.Rulings: COURT ORDERS RELOCATION TO BE PAID BY LANDLORD TO EACH TENANT IN AMOUNT OF $4,400.00. TENANTS ARE ONLY TO RECEIVE WHEN LEAVE THE BUILDING. LANDLORD ONLY REQUIRED TO OFFER RELOCATION COSTS FOR 30 DAYS. (302/AJR/PB)
